result.summary: The page is mostly well-rendered, but there is a significant overlap issue where the 'SCROLL DOWN' element sits on top of the legal terms text, plus some readability and navigation icon inconsistencies.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' pill/button overlaps the terms and conditions fine print at the bottom of the promo section, obscuring several lines of legally required disclosure text.
issues.suggestion: Add vertical spacing or reposition the scroll indicator below the disclaimer block so the T&C text is fully readable.

issues.description: The legal disclaimer text is extremely small and rendered in dark blue on a bright yellow-to-image gradient, making parts of it hard to read (especially where it runs over the photo background).
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size, place the disclaimer on a solid background, and ensure WCAG-compliant contrast for the fine print.

issues.description: In the bottom navigation bar, the 'SPORTS' item has no icon while all other items (Casino, Live Casino, Poker, Promos, Support) have icons, and its label is vertically misaligned compared to the others.
issues.suggestion: Add the missing sports icon or align the 'SPORTS' label baseline with the other nav items for visual consistency.

issues.description: The chevron/scroll-down arrows on either side of the 'SCROLL DOWN' text sit directly over the disclaimer text, adding to the cluttered appearance in that region.
issues.suggestion: Group the chevrons with the scroll indicator in a dedicated container with adequate padding and z-index separation from surrounding content.
